articles.author: Todd Spangler
articles.title: Apple Music Hikes Subscription Prices, Citing Rising Licensing Fees - Variety
articles.description: Apple is hiking the prices of Apple Music subscription plans -- the tech giant's first rate increases for the service since the fall of 2022, citing higher music licensing costs.
articles.content:
Apple is hiking the prices of Apple Music subscription plans — the tech giant’s first rate increases for the service since the fall of 2022, citing higher music licensing costs.
